questionHtml: Distinguish between this mounting and the Newtonian mounting.
markschemeHtml:
Newtonian mount has

plane/not curved «secondary» mirror

«secondary» mirror at angle/45° to axis

eyepiece at side/at 90° to axis

mount shown is Cassegrain

 

OWTTE

Accept these marking points in diagram form

[2 marks]

meta.title: Distinguish between this mounting and the Newtonian mounting.
